title: urtica gracilis var. greenei
intro: Urtica gracilis var. greenei, also known as Greene's stinging nettle or California stinging nettle, is a subspecies of the stinging nettle plant, characterized by its small size and stinging hairs. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce pain. The health benefits of Urtica gracilis var. greenei include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Urtica gracilis var. greenei can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
